title: 點解HKU會有一班台灣畢業嘅Professor ?

replies.msg:
連登仔個個都IVY LEAGUE、OXBRIDGE，最基本都HKU畢業，我只係在台灣大學同HKU畢業，見到連登仔講到成個台灣啲大學都係垃圾，台灣大學畢業等於唔識英文，我誠意請教一下，點解HKU有一班台灣畢業嘅Professor?

可唔可以拜託下睇唔起台灣大學嘅各位高人，去沙宣道港大醫學院SBS同Dr YU, Dr TI, Dr FUNG, Dr LAW講，話台灣無間大學係好嘢
，等佢地自卑慚愧一下？

AMAZON助養計劃

各位香港人，眼見政府同警察手段愈來愈卑劣，過期既催淚彈不停亂放，一套保護自己的裝備變相更為重要，就算FIRST AID TEAM或街坊路過都受到影響，鑑於之前收到好多香港市民係市面話好難買到保護自己的裝備同價錢偏貴(大陸3M不進口香港，令好多五金鋪同商店都斷哂貨或者要賣好貴既價錢)有見及此，我地希望將保護裝備帶比有經濟困難買唔到裝既朋友，比佢地揀一套岩佢地既裝，希望保障返佢地健康。我地只會提供可進口民用保護裝，所有任何有攻擊性既裝都不會代購。

現階段會先入手以下4種保護裝備，購物清單會因應用家意見會不斷update

1. 3M Safety 60926罐 多氣體/蒸汽盒
2. 3M 半罩式可重複使用的呼吸器 6200
3. 防割袖口一對
4. Pyramex I-force H2X護目鏡 (可配合泳鏡使用)
(頭盔因運費太高暫不作考慮)

一套四件價錢為$654連運費

資助計劃做法:
1. 有意助養的家長捐錢
2. 有需要的小朋友揀貨，每人限選一套
3. Admin會整合購買，在AMAZON落訂單

小朋友想要保護裝備請入AMAZON助養計劃Channel先填寫申請表

@heehee999

@happywithmydogs

replies.msg:
It would be easier if I just type in English.

Rankings are like marketing, only the university management cares about it and it’s dominated by Anglophone universities.

For academics, we only care about research. Most rankings depend on a whole varieties of criteria, for example, fundings, teaching, diversity etc. Let’s say Paris 6, it’s top notch in what it doesn’t do well in ranking.

Another extreme case would be Steklov Institute in Russia, or many schools in Eastern Europe in general. They produced many big names in research but you can’t even see them in rankings because they just can’t afford to play this ranking game.

It would be easier if I just type in English.

Rankings are like marketing, only the university management cares about it and it’s dominated by Anglophone universities.

For academics, we only care about research. Most rankings depend on a whole varieties of criteria, for example, fundings, teaching, diversity etc. Let’s say Paris 6, it’s top notch in what it doesn’t do well in ranking.

Another extreme case would be Steklov Institute in Russia, or many schools in Eastern Europe in general. They produced many big names in research but you can’t even see them in rankings because they just can’t afford to play this ranking game.

To be fair, this particular post doesn't seem to have that much to do with considerations over prestige/ranking/other petty matters, but very practical concerns over  things like financials, family/personal relationships, prospects etc. Choosing where to pursue your studies isn't always a straight-forward decision. As someone who's studied abroad, you should know better. Honestly you seem to be projecting. I hope you stop feeling bad about yourself. Not everyone thinks people who didn't go to top-notch colleges are failures!
你成段文字，最後都係想帶出「top-notch college」一句作為嘲笑，真係畀你錐到好痛，唉呀，不過見到你讀「top-notch college」都係咁嘅格局，讀唔讀都真係唔太重要。

replies.msg: Well, your assumption that I was mocking people who didn't go to top-notch colleges is exactly why I said you sounded like you were projecting – I actually do mean it literally that "not everyone thinks people who didn't go to top-notch colleges are failures!" In my earlier post, which you may have missed, I talked about the meaninglessness of stuff like ranking for researchers/academics because the research itself should speak for itself. When you go on to do postgraduate research work, no one cares that much where you did your undergraduate degree, only your research! Perhaps you should try to figure out where your negativity is coming from. Good luck with your PhD applications.

quote.msg: 你成段文字，最後都係想帶出「top-notch college」一句作為嘲笑，真係畀你錐到好痛，唉呀，不過見到你讀「top-notch college」都係咁嘅格局，讀唔讀都真係唔太重要。

Well, your assumption that I was mocking people who didn't go to top-notch colleges is exactly why I said you sounded like you were projecting – I actually do mean it literally that "not everyone thinks people who didn't go to top-notch colleges are failures!" In my earlier post, which you may have missed, I talked about the meaninglessness of stuff like ranking for researchers/academics because the research itself should speak for itself. When you go on to do postgraduate research work, no one cares that much where you did your undergraduate degree, only your research! Perhaps you should try to figure out where your negativity is coming from. Good luck with your PhD applications.

I do understand the mechanism of academia, the only thing which I pointed out here from the very beginning is the arrogance and narrow world view shared by many people in HK, as they are stereotypical and saying words like 'All unis in TW are trash.' I think at some point you are just psychoanalysing my intention and somehow condescending, but I do appreciate your suggestion.

成個POST從第一個貼文都係講緊：
台灣有好大學，香港人唔好咁自大

舉出一堆台灣畢業嘅人在香港教書嘅例子，係顯示台灣學歷持有人都可以在香港大學教書，就係咁簡單。

英國有好大學 美國有好大學 澳洲有好大學

唔係去以上既國家讀大學就係勁，個到都有野雞大學

香港人個心態係會笑鳩人讀野雞大學

結果「香港人笑人讀野雞大學」+「台灣有好撚多野雞大學」=「香港人笑鳩人讀台灣野雞大學」

而台灣野雞大學實在太多，影響埋本身「台灣大學」既形象，就變成「香港人笑鳩人讀台灣大學」，直接否定埋「台灣大學」既學歷，亦都係樓主一開始既命題。

但係依樣野唔係香港人自大所造成，而係『台灣野雞大學實在太多，影響埋本身「台灣大學」既形象』，係台灣自己做臭咗自己個名所造成。

我地唔會一見到英國美國大學就會笑鳩人地，就係因為佢地冇做臭個名，但係讀英國美國既野雞大學，我地一樣笑鳩你。

獲獎後，在由太太代筆的公開信自言「在香港就讀高中、也曾在中大執教鞭、當校長，並在這裏退休，在香港生活逾三十載，是個名副其實的香港人。」


我地香港係金融城市喎，我絕對冇話香港科研界比台灣優秀，只係聖若瑟書院咁都培育到個諾貝爾物理學獎得主，同埋係佢太太話佢係香港人，我冇屈佢


港燈的供電可靠性在國際上首屈一指。自1997年起，我們的供電可靠程度每年均維持在逾99.999%的高水平，傲視世界上很多大城市。

咁岩我係埋大大電聽過呢個point，講真香港大電已經超額完成任務啦，一個城市又冇地設廠好難同台灣呢d國家比，加上比中共lead住細電冇得發圍，點整個台積電出黎，一定要去過外國
